parent_sha: 25e5511f860c1c58f5d913734a09ea8adf36e39f
commit_subject: Add commit-message format gate and local-CI mirror coverage

- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:38: approval_turn: user 'take these to the panel and fix it' (panel-converged) + reduce-and-audit prep | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: CC-prefix allowlist (lowercase, -cmatch). Colon need not be followed by space so `fix:typo`/`wip:` are caught; `Fix parser:` passes.
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:40: approval_turn: user 'take these to the panel and fix it' (panel-converged) + reduce-and-audit prep | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: Genuine-revert body line: blank or "This reverts commit <hex>." (no Conflicts: allowance - cleanup=strip drops it; it would let a trailer be smuggled)
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:42: approval_turn: user 'take these to the panel and fix it' (panel-converged) + reduce-and-audit prep | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: Trailer names - for a clearer diagnostic only; the no-body rule (any non-whitespace body line) is the real boundary.
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:66: approval_turn: user 'take these to the panel and fix it' (panel-converged) + reduce-and-audit prep | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: Normalize %B (a string or string[]) and strip CR so a CRLF `Subject.\r` cannot escape the trailing-period rule.
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:69: approval_turn: user 'take these to the panel and fix it' (panel-converged) + reduce-and-audit prep | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: Drop the trailing empty line(s) %B leaves (the final newline), but KEEP interior blanks (subject/body separator).
